description: Per-task current state and last run result for Nexus Repository Manager scheduled tasks via REST API
technicalNotes: Discovery and collection both use GET /service/rest/v1/tasks with continuationToken pagination. Discovery emits all tasks as instances. Collection fetches the paginated task list and matches by task ID. State mapping: WAITING=0, RUNNING=1, unknown=2. Result mapping: OK=0, FAILED=1, CANCELED=2, unknown=3.
name: Nexus_Task_Health
